current_focus: Expand compute accelerator crawler coverage to domestic sources and PDF captures.

tasks.title: Add domestic accelerator sources and PDF crawler support
tasks.description: Add reachable domestic GPU, NPU, AI ASIC, DPU, IPU, SmartNIC, and PDF disclosure sources to the accelerator crawler, support PDF raw evidence plus text extraction, and run a formal crawl that stores raw evidence in ai_infra.
tasks.verify: cd personal-wiki/apps/crawler_workbench/backend && PYTHONPATH=. pytest -q tests/test_fetchers.py tests/test_hashing_raw_store.py tests/test_db_profiles.py && cd /home/fyz/codex-skills/.worktrees/domestic-accelerator-crawl && pytest -q scripts/tests/test_compute_accelerator_formal_crawl.py && python3 scripts/compute_accelerator_formal_crawl.py verify-manifest --repo-root . --manifest .codex/accelerator-crawl/compute-accelerator-domestic-crawl-01/manifest.json --min-succeeded 1 && python personal-wiki/tools/wiki_cli/cli.py --root personal-wiki validate-accelerators && python personal-wiki/tools/wiki_cli/cli.py --root personal-wiki validate --domain ai_infra

tasks.title: formal crawl of compute accelerator source profiles
tasks.description: Run the controlled formal crawl CLI for compute accelerator source profiles and verify its manifest, raw evidence, and ai_infra wiki validation before evaluator acceptance.
tasks.verify: pytest -q scripts/tests/test_compute_accelerator_formal_crawl.py && python3 scripts/compute_accelerator_formal_crawl.py verify-manifest --repo-root . --manifest .codex/accelerator-crawl/compute-accelerator-formal-crawl-01/manifest.json --min-succeeded 1 && python personal-wiki/tools/wiki_cli/cli.py --root personal-wiki validate-accelerators && python personal-wiki/tools/wiki_cli/cli.py --root personal-wiki validate --domain ai_infra

tasks.title: Build compute accelerator spec catalog seed
tasks.description: Create the structured accelerator spec catalog, curated wiki pages, crawler source metadata, and validation checks for GPU, NPU, TPU, DPU, IPU, FPGA, DSA, and AI ASIC coverage.
tasks.verify: python personal-wiki/tools/wiki_cli/cli.py --root personal-wiki validate-accelerators && python personal-wiki/tools/wiki_cli/cli.py --root personal-wiki validate --domain ai_infra && PYTHONPATH=personal-wiki/tests pytest -q personal-wiki/tests/test_accelerator_catalog.py && cd personal-wiki/apps/crawler_workbench/backend && PYTHONPATH=. pytest -q tests/test_db_profiles.py

tasks.title: Validate wiki crawler end-to-end through independent evaluator
tasks.description: Run a dedicated evaluator scenario that exercises crawler fetch, queue approval, ingest, index, backlinks, and validation from a user perspective.

tasks.title: 验证 evaluator auto-trigger wiring 的最小 demo
tasks.description: 运行通用 demo helper 生成一个可验证输出，用于证明 Step4 安装后的 Stop hook 能自动触发 evaluator 并写出 verdict。
